params.description: Hundred Grid Mode B displays student-built rectangle with dimension labels (W × H) and area label visible at center. Equation overlay suppressed. Grid snap enabled.

Sentence builder appears with 5 blank slots. Some slots pre-filled with linked values from Mode B Check: dimension values and area value auto-pushed. Pre-filled slots visually distinct from empty slots.

beats.text: Now fill in the sentence about your rectangle.
Tap each blank slot and fill in the sentence.

validator.description: All slots filled correctly: area value in slot 1, fixed side length in slot 2, matching multiplication factors in slots 3-4-5

params.description: All slots confirm. Sentence displays complete.

beats.text: Your sentence says the area is a multiple of the fixed side length because width times height equals the area. That matches the rectangle you built.

elements.description: Hundred Grid Mode B displays student-built rectangle with dimension labels (W × H) and area label visible. Grid snap enabled. Equation overlay suppressed.
Sentence builder shows completed template: area is a multiple of fixed side length because width times height equals area. All slots filled and confirmed.
